comments.body: Use only observable list if you can, drop usage of arraylists. Where is your listview, I cannot see it in the code? How the view.fillList looks like?
please provide a SSCCE that demonstrates the problem

title: JAVA fx 8 List View Update
body:
I want to update a ListView with int values out of my ArrayList and update it every time a value changes. It seems Simple but I'm really stuck and read about 3 hours on the web already. Here's my code if it helps.

This is where I add data to my listview:

   public void setQuizModel(QuizModel model)
{
    this.quizModel = model;

    // this.antworten.bind(this.quizModel.getrichtigvalue());
    for (int i = 0; i < this.quizModel.getQuiz().size(); i++)
    {
        this.view.fillList("1. " + this.quizModel.getQuiz().get(i).getFragen() + " (Antworten: " + this.quizModel.getOAnswearlist().get(this.quizModel.getNumberq()) + ", davon richtig:" + this.quizModel.getORightlist().get(this.quizModel.getNumberq()) + " )");
    }
}

My lists:

private ArrayList<Integer> antworten = new ArrayList<>();

private ObservableList<Integer> oantworten = FXCollections.observableArrayList(this.antworten);

private ArrayList<Integer> richtig = new ArrayList<>();

private ObservableList<Integer> orichtig = FXCollections.observableArrayList(this.richtig);

private ArrayList<Quiz> quizcollection = new ArrayList<>();

thats how I fill them:

  for (int i = 0; i < this.quizcollection.size(); i++)
    {
        this.oantworten.add(new Integer(0));
        this.orichtig.add(new Integer(0));
    }

And so one of the values inside the list gets changed and I want to update listview(I thought it would happen automatically through the observable list)

  public void richtigincrement()
{
    this.orichtig.add(this.numberq, this.orichtig.get(this.numberq).intValue() + 1);
}

public void antwortincrement()
{

    this.oantworten.add(this.numberq, this.oantworten.get(this.numberq).intValue() + 1);

}

Thank you very much for all help

EDIT:
the view.filllist is called in the view class to fill the list

    public void fillList(String e)
    {
        this.list.getItems().add(e);
    }

Here's the code of the 3 classes which are needed http://pastebin.com/iDxuK0nk the Problem is to define it more exactly. It's a Quiz with 4 radio buttons. Every time I make an answer it should save how often I tried to answer that question and how often it was right. 2 Arrays or Observ.Lists 1 for the total answers on the question and 1 for the right answers on that question. And if I click on overview I see this values, but the problem is it didn't change the values it get out of the arrays in the listview if they change.
